data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for walk-up QR booking.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the walk-up QR booking functionality, which is a specific requirement outlined in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality has been implemented or validated. The lack of evidence regarding the ability to scan for availability and book on the spot leads to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of walk-up QR booking functionality being implemented or validated.
